meta.title: Microscope Dentistry | Prudentia Micro Dental Care
meta.description: Experience revolutionary microscope-assisted dental care with 30x magnification for precise, minimally invasive treatments.

hero.title: Microscope Dentistry:
hero.description: At Prudentia Micro Dental Care, we do dentistry differently with revolutionary Dental Operating Microscope (DOM) technology bringing 30x magnification to your care.

consultation.title: What Is a
consultation.subtitle: A modern dental examination powered by microscope technology to uncover issues invisible to the naked eye.

philosophy.title: See More, Treat Less Philosophy
points: Early diagnosis of micro-fractures and decay
Live video feeds for better understanding

why.title: Why Microscopy Matters
why.description: Dr. Bhushan uses high-powered magnification to detect early-stage tooth decay, micro-fractures, or subtle gum disease that conventional exams might miss.

items.title: Early Detection
items.description: Spot problems before they become painful or require extensive treatment.

items.title: Informed Decisions
items.description: See what we see and understand your treatment options.

items.title: Precision Treatment
items.description: Target only the affected areas while preserving healthy tooth structure.

benefits.title: Why Choose
benefits.description: Here's what sets microscope-assisted dental care apart from conventional methods.

items.title: 30x Magnification
items.description: See details invisible to the naked eye for precise diagnosis.

items.title: Early Detection
items.description: Spot cavities and cracks before symptoms appear.

items.title: Faster Healing
items.description: Precise treatments mean less trauma and quicker recovery.

cleaning.title: Advanced Dental Cleaning with a
cleaning.subtitle: Even routine procedures benefit from our microscope-enhanced approach.

steps.title: Ultrasonic Scalers
steps.description: Break up tartar with gentle vibrations.

steps.title: Air Polishers
steps.description: Remove plaque and stains with fine powder mist.

steps.title: Desensitizing Rinse
steps.description: Strengthens enamel and protects against decay.

benefit.title: Long-Term Benefits
benefit.description: By smoothing tooth surfaces under magnification, we help prevent plaque from reattaching, making it easier to maintain your oral health between visits.

health.title: Your Mouth Reflects Your
health.description: The mouth is often the first place systemic diseases show early signs. During a Micro-Consultation, Dr. Bhushan may detect symptoms that indicate broader health issues well before they become serious.
health.footer: This makes micro-dentistry not just about your teeth, but your total well-being.
